requirement_topic.en: State-Entity Importer / Authorized Representative — ETECSA, CIMEX, and MINCOM-Authorized State Enterprises; Limited Private Import Channels
requirement_topic.zh: 国家实体进口商/授权代表——ETECSA、CIMEX及MINCOM授权国家企业；私人进口渠道极为有限
requirement_topic.zht: 國家實體進口商/授權代表——ETECSA、CIMEX及MINCOM授權國家企業；私人進口管道極為有限

summary.en: Cuba's import structure is dominated by state entities. Private importers are largely absent from the commercial equipment import market due to the state-controlled economy. For telecom and radio terminal equipment, the principal import channels are: ETECSA (Empresa de Telecomunicaciones de Cuba S.A.), the national telecom monopoly operator, which procures network infrastructure and terminal equipment; CIMEX and other state commercial enterprises authorized to import consumer electronics; and MINCOM-authorized state entities for regulated equipment categories. China-Cuba trade for telecommunications equipment frequently operates through government-to-government (G2G) procurement channels, with Chinese state-owned enterprises (Huawei, ZTE) having established direct supplier relationships with ETECSA. The MINCOM homologación technical file must identify the Cuban responsible entity (state importer or authorized representative). US dollar transactions are restricted by the US embargo; CNY (Chinese yuan) and euro payment routes are commonly used for China-Cuba bilateral trade. Import licensing is administered by Cuban customs (Aduana General de la República) in coordination with the relevant ministry.
summary.zh: 古巴进口结构由国家实体主导。由于国家管控经济，私人进口商在商业设备进口市场中基本缺失。电信和无线电终端设备的主要进口渠道为：ETECSA（古巴电信公司），国家电信垄断运营商，负责采购网络基础设施和终端设备；CIMEX及其他经授权进口消费电子产品的国家商业企业；以及针对受监管设备类别的MINCOM授权国家实体。中古电信设备贸易通常通过政府间（G2G）采购渠道运作，中国国有企业（华为、中兴）已与ETECSA建立直接供应商关系。MINCOM型式认可技术文件须标明古巴责任实体（国家进口商或授权代表）。美国禁运限制美元交易；中古双边贸易通常使用人民币和欧元支付路线。进口许可由古巴海关（共和国总海关）与相关部委协调管理。
summary.zht: 古巴進口結構由國家實體主導。由於國家管控經濟，私人進口商在商業設備進口市場中基本缺失。電信和無線電終端設備的主要進口管道為：ETECSA（古巴電信公司），國家電信壟斷營運商，負責採購網路基礎設施和終端裝置；CIMEX及其他經授權進口消費電子產品的國家商業企業；以及針對受監管設備類別的MINCOM授權國家實體。中古電信設備貿易通常通過政府間（G2G）採購管道運作，中國國有企業（華為、中興）已與ETECSA建立直接供應商關係。MINCOM型式認可技術文件須標明古巴責任實體（國家進口商或授權代表）。美國禁運限制美元交易；中古雙邊貿易通常使用人民幣和歐元支付路線。進口許可由古巴海關（共和國總海關）與相關部委協調管理。

standards_or_laws: Decreto-Ley No. 99/1987 De las Telecomunicaciones — telecom regulatory base law establishing MINCOM oversight
Cuban state import licensing system — Aduana General de la República (Cuban customs authority)
ETECSA procurement regulations — state telecom operator procurement framework
Cuba-China BRI bilateral trade framework — Government-to-government (G2G) procurement channels for telecom equipment
US embargo (OFAC sanctions) — restricts USD transactions; CNY/EUR routes used for China-Cuba trade

summary.en: In China, importers and distributors of telecom and radio terminal equipment must hold applicable business licenses (营业执照) and, for CCC-covered products, be registered as the responsible party in the CCC certificate. MIIT NAL (Network Access License) applications require a Chinese legal entity as the applicant. There is no state monopoly on equipment importation; private companies can import and distribute subject to relevant licensing and certification requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，电信和无线电终端设备的进口商和经销商须持有适用营业执照，对于CCC覆盖产品，须在CCC证书中登记为责任方。工业和信息化部进网许可证（NAL）申请须以中国法人实体为申请人。设备进口不存在国家垄断；私营企业可在符合相关许可和认证要求的前提下进口和经销。
summary.zht: 在中國，電信和無線電終端設備的進口商和經銷商須持有適用營業執照，對於CCC涵蓋產品，須在CCC證書中登記為責任方。工業和信息化部進網許可證（NAL）申請須以中國法人實體為申請人。設備進口不存在國家壟斷；私營企業可在符合相關許可和認證要求的前提下進口和經銷。

standards_or_laws: Chinese Business License (营业执照) — required for importers and distributors
CCC certificate responsible party registration — importer/brand owner registered as responsible entity
MIIT NAL application — Chinese legal entity required as applicant for Network Access License
No state monopoly on telecom equipment importation in China — open to qualified private and state enterprises

gap.en: Cuba's state-dominated import structure is a fundamental market-access constraint with no equivalent in China's open import system. Private importers are largely unavailable as channel partners in Cuba. Chinese manufacturers or exporters must engage ETECSA, CIMEX, or another MINCOM-authorized state entity as the Cuban responsible importer — this is typically achieved through the established G2G procurement framework or direct supplier agreements with ETECSA. The MINCOM homologación technical file must name the Cuban state responsible entity. US dollar payment is restricted by the embargo; CNY and euro routes are required. Exporters should budget for the additional time and complexity of engaging with Cuban state procurement processes and navigating embargo-related payment restrictions.
gap.zh: 古巴以国家为主导的进口结构是市场准入的根本性制约，与中国开放的进口体系没有对应。在古巴，私人进口商作为渠道伙伴基本缺失。中国制造商或出口商须与ETECSA、CIMEX或其他MINCOM授权国家实体合作，作为古巴责任进口商——这通常通过成熟的政府间采购框架或与ETECSA的直接供应商协议实现。MINCOM型式认可技术文件须注明古巴国家责任实体。禁运限制美元支付；须使用人民币和欧元路线。出口商应为与古巴国家采购流程对接及应对禁运相关支付限制所需的额外时间和复杂性做好预算。
gap.zht: 古巴以國家為主導的進口結構是市場准入的根本性制約，與中國開放的進口體系沒有對應。在古巴，私人進口商作為渠道夥伴基本缺失。中國製造商或出口商須與ETECSA、CIMEX或其他MINCOM授權國家實體合作，作為古巴責任進口商——這通常通過成熟的政府間採購框架或與ETECSA的直接供應商協議實現。MINCOM型式認可技術文件須注明古巴國家責任實體。禁運限制美元支付；須使用人民幣和歐元路線。出口商應為與古巴國家採購流程對接及應對禁運相關支付限制所需的額外時間和複雜性做好預算。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Cuban state-authorized importer or responsible entity (ETECSA, CIMEX, or MINCOM-authorized enterprise) must be identified in the MINCOM homologación technical file; private importers are largely unavailable; US dollar transactions are restricted by the US embargo
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — China has no state monopoly on equipment importation; private and state enterprises may import subject to business licensing and CCC/NAL certification requirements

source.publisher: ETECSA — Empresa de Telecomunicaciones de Cuba S.A.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cuba's state-controlled import structure means equipment exporters must engage ETECSA, CIMEX, or another MINCOM-authorized state entity as the Cuban responsible importer — private import channels are largely unavailable. G2G procurement frameworks are the established pathway for Chinese telecom equipment entering Cuba. US dollar payment is restricted by the US embargo; CNY and euro routes are required. Verify current Cuban import licensing requirements, available state procurement channels, and embargo-compliant payment arrangements with qualified legal and regulatory professionals before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 古巴国家管控的进口结构意味着设备出口商须与ETECSA、CIMEX或其他MINCOM授权国家实体合作，作为古巴责任进口商——私人进口渠道基本缺失。政府间采购框架是中国电信设备进入古巴的成熟通道。禁运限制美元支付；须使用人民币和欧元路线。发货前请与合格法律和监管专业人士核验现行古巴进口许可要求、可用国家采购渠道及符合禁运规定的支付安排。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 古巴國家管控的進口結構意味著設備出口商須與ETECSA、CIMEX或其他MINCOM授權國家實體合作，作為古巴責任進口商——私人進口管道基本缺失。政府間採購框架是中國電信設備進入古巴的成熟通道。禁運限制美元支付；須使用人民幣和歐元路線。發貨前請與合格法律和監管專業人士核驗現行古巴進口許可要求、可用國家採購管道及符合禁運規定的支付安排。
